evals.prompt: Where should I add a new LanguageFilterChip component?
evals.expected_output: Structural guidance: src/components/LanguageFilterChip/ with index.tsx + styles.ts, named export, @/ import path.

assertions.text: Response states src/components/ as the parent folder
Response lists index.tsx as one of the files to create
Response lists styles.ts as one of the files to create
Response shows @/ alias in import example (not relative path)
Response does not contain JSX implementation code (no return statement, no View/Text components rendered)

evals.prompt: Where and how should I add an analytics service for screen views?
evals.expected_output: Structural guidance: src/services/analyticsService.ts (Service suffix), named export, @/ import path.

assertions.text: Response states src/services/ as the parent folder
Response uses Service suffix in the file name (analyticsService.ts or similar)
Response uses .ts extension (not .js or .tsx) for the service file
Response shows @/ alias in import example
Response does not contain full function implementations (no async function bodies with business logic)

evals.prompt: What files do I need to create for a new SettingsScreen?
evals.expected_output: Structural guidance: src/screens/SettingsScreen/ with index.tsx + styles.ts, Screen suffix in folder name, default export.

assertions.text: Response states src/screens/ as the parent folder
Response uses Screen suffix in the folder name (SettingsScreen)
Response lists index.tsx as one of the files to create
Response lists styles.ts as one of the files to create
Response mentions default export for the screen
Response shows @/ alias in import example
